hidden_state.wab_instruction: A production incident has been reported. Find the alert email (check all inbox tabs) and read the full thread to understand the issue. The error code is in one of the earlier messages, and the on-call engineer's email is mentioned in another. Forward the alert to the on-call engineer, including the error code in your note. Then reply to the separate thread from {target.manager_name} confirming you are handling the incident (Reply only — the thread includes leadership). Star all emails related to the incident. Create a 'P0 Incident' label and apply it to all incident-related emails. Finally, go to Settings and create a filter that stars and labels future emails from the alerting system address with 'CRITICAL' in the subject.

task_completion_criteria.status_phrase: I am actively triaging the incident.
